title: lepadena bicolor
side_effects: Lepadena bicolor can have side effects if used improperly, such as causing skin irritation, allergic reactions, and gastrointestinal problems in some individuals. Ingesting the plant's sap can lead to nausea, vomiting, and diarrhea due to its toxic compounds. Prolonged exposure to the plant's leaves or sap may also cause eye irritation and respiratory issues. Improper use of Lepadena bicolor can exacerbate existing health conditions, such as kidney or liver disease.
